session.user: Run the following commands in /home/runner/work/erk/erk and report results for each: 1. `uv run pytest tests/commands/pr/ -v` 2. `uv run ruff check src/erk/cli/output.py src/erk/cli/commands/pr/resolve_conflicts_cmd.py` 3. `uv run ty check src/erk/cli/commands/pr/resolve_conflicts_cmd.py`

session.assistant:
## Results Summary
All three commands passed successfully:
1. **pytest passed**: 263 passed in 2.23s - All PR command tests (test_address, test_check, test_checkout, test_resolve_conflicts, test_submit, and 17 other test modules) passed without failures
2. **ruff check passed**: All checks passed - No linting violations in `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/output.py` - No linting violations in `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/pr/resolve_conflicts_cmd.py`
3. **ty check passed**: All checks passed - No type checking errors in `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/pr/resolve_conflicts_cmd.py`
